chunks.title: Dedication of the Tabernacle and Carts
chunks.reason: Narrative describing the anointing of the tabernacle and the allocation of carts to the Levites.

chunks.title: Twelve Days of Altar Offerings
chunks.reason: Repetitive catalog of offerings brought by each tribal leader over twelve days.

chunks.title: Moses Speaks with God
chunks.reason: Narrative conclusion describing Moses entering the tent to hear God's voice.
